org.apache.dubbo.common.constants

接口 RegistryConstants

  • 所有已知实现类:
    Constants, RpcConstants

    public interface RegistryConstants

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static String ACCEPTS_KEY 
      static String APP_DYNAMIC_CONFIGURATORS_CATEGORY

      static String CONSUMERS_CATEGORY

      static int DEFAULT_INSTANCES_REQUEST_SIZE

      The parameter value of Service-Oriented Registry type
      static String SUBSCRIBED_SERVICE_NAMES_KEY
      The parameter key of the subscribed service names for Service-Oriented Registry If there is a multiple-values, the "comma" is the separator.
      static String ZONE_KEY

      • SUBSCRIBED_SERVICE_NAMES_KEY

        static final String SUBSCRIBED_SERVICE_NAMES_KEY
        The parameter key of the subscribed service names for Service-Oriented Registry

        If there is a multiple-values, the "comma" is the separator.

        从以下版本开始:
        2.7.5
        另请参阅:
        常量字段值
